title: stephanophorum × biflorum
intro: Stephanophorum × biflorum, also known as Stephanophorum biflorum or Stephanophorum x biflorum, is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Stephanophorum flavidum and Stephanophorum flavidum var. flavidum. However, I can not verify if this is correct as I was unable to find any information about Stephanophorum × biflorum.
